_note: FROZEN full-path-sim baseline. Re-baseline only intentionally (delete + rerun gen).
_rebaseline_note: Re-frozen 2026-06-10 for Daniel's coach-audit batch (R2 + R6b). TWO ungated changes legitimately shift BOTH the OFF and ON arms: (1) R2 — the curated REP_RANGES spec (laterals/rear-delt 12-20, curls/triceps 10-15, leg ext/curl 15-20, calves 12-20) is the curated truth, applied regardless of dp_rep_class_v1 (the flag governs DERIVATION for non-curated names only), so every prescription's repsTarget moved → meanVolumeKg shifts. (2) R6b — the session-duration estimator constants (SET_WORK_SEC 40->50, EXERCISE_TRANSITION_SEC 75->105, calibrated on Daniel's real sessions) feed trimSessionToTimeBudget in the same scheduleAdapterAggregate the full path runs, so more-realistic (higher) durations make the persona-time-cap trim cut slightly more — meanExerciseCount 7.45->7.25, meanSetTotal 15.32->14.69, meanDurationMin 48.5->52.8 (more realistic, as intended). Determinism is INTACT (the section-A fresh-OFF-reproduces-itself test passes → no RNG/clock leak; only the deterministic rep-band + trim moved). Section-C SAFETY IMPROVED, not worse: craterOff 68->63, craterOn 57->52, OFF 'absurd' 34->32 — the more-realistic trim and class-correct rep bands reduce absurd/crater prescriptions. The new default-ON selection flags (dp_anchor_sets_v1, dp_biceps_guarantee_v1) are pinned OFF in FLIPPED_FLAGS so the OFF arm stays a true all-off world; their ON behavior is proven on the unit suites + #70 persona matrix, NOT in this determinism stream.
